title: HGV Driver CV Example UK — Class 1 & Class 2

cv.name: David Walsh
cv.title: HGV Class 1 Driver
cv.summary: HGV Class 1 driver with 6 years trunking and multi-drop experience across the North West. CPC and digital tachograph certified with clean licence and strong safety record. Available for nights, tramping, and weekend shifts.

bullets: Completed 50+ trunking runs weekly with 99.2% on-time delivery rate
Maintained zero preventable accidents over 180,000+ recorded miles
Completed daily walk-around checks and defect reports to DVSA standards
Delivered 25+ multi-drop loads daily across Greater Manchester
Trained 2 new drivers on load securing and reverse manoeuvres

education.degree: CPC Driver Certificate of Professional Competence
education.raw:
CPC Driver Certificate of Professional Competence — 2019
Class 1 HGV Licence · Class 2 HGV Licence
